articles.title: Thousands of websites taken down for illegal World Cup streams
articles.difficulty_reason: Short, direct news report with a clear single story and low background knowledge; mostly B1/B2 vocabulary and simple sentence structure.

articles.title: 'I made £100,000 of TikTok sales in one day': The business of live shopping
articles.difficulty_reason: General-interest business feature with moderate sentence complexity and useful B1/B2/C1 vocabulary; some commercial background helps but is not required.

articles.title: Burnham has big ideas - but what will they cost?
articles.difficulty_reason: Dense analytical piece on fiscal and political trade-offs with long, complex sentences and B2/C1/C2 vocabulary; requires background on UK economics and government.
